title: CubeSoft Pack
body:
# CubeSoft Pack CubeSoft Pack is a Forge-based modpack for Minecraft 1.8.9 focused on technology. It is relatively lightweight and contains the BetterFPS optimization mod. Currently in beta. ## The following mods could NOT be included in the pack due to their restrictive licenses, it is highly recommended that you install them manually:
  • IndustrialCraft2
  • Streams
  • Farseek
## Mod list
  • Antique Atlas
  • Better Foliage
  • BetterFps
  • Biomes O' Plenty
  • Buildcraft
  • Dynamic Surroundings
  • Horse Debug Info
  • Immersive Engineering
  • IvToolkit
  • MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod
  • ProjectE
  • Recurrent Complex
  • Village Names

Buildcraft - Minecraft Mod Public License (https://github.com/BuildCraft/BuildCraft/blob/8.0.x/LICENSE) Dynamic Surroundings - LGPL v3 Horse Debug Info - GPL v3 Immersive Engineering - Blu's License of Common Sense (https://www.curseforge.com/project/231951/license) IvToolkit - Apache License v2 MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod - GPL v3 ProjectE - MIT Recurrent Complex - MIT Village Names - LGPL v3 ## Mod attributions BuildCraft by AlexIIL and others (CurseForge) Biomes O' Plenty by Forstride and others (CurseForge)
